title: Indian Stir Fry with Fermented Rice
description: A flavorful and nutritious Indian-inspired stir fry made with fermented rice, featuring a mix of energizing spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the eggplant and bell peppers; stir-fry for 3-4 minutes or until they begin to soften.
Add the Indian Spice Blend; stir-fry for an additional minute.
Add the fermented rice; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until the rice is lightly toasted.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice mixture with a fork; serve hot.
